{{nihongo|'''Kokubunjihekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunjihekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunjihekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunjihekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kokubunjihekireki Shrine | native_name = 国分寺霹靂神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kokubunjihekireki Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.154147|132.402094}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kokubunji Hekireki Shrine'''|国分寺霹靂神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iwami Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
